facts.content: Mission Control v4 live at localhost:3131. Taskboard working. Calendar and AI need upgrades.
Active projects: OpenClaw JARVIS (65%), Revenue Automation (30%), Self-Running Systems (45%). Revenue Automation is priority - lowest progress.
Hardware: M4 Pro MacBook, 48GB RAM. Ollama available for local inference. Telegram bot @Skiclaw_bot for notifications.
Cron jobs: Morning brief 8am MMT (GPT-4o), Day summary 8pm MMT. Need to add 7:30am planning engine.
Mission: Batman-style nocturnal automation. Ship daily. Find revenue. Think like Elon - ambitious, fast, safe.
